activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception not active
General goods description with invoice reference
Mixed origins requiring per-article origin indication

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'ERICSSON AB' from certificate found explicitly in invoice header and invoice remit-to section with matching address including country 'SWEDEN'. Land matches exactly per normalization rules. No indication of multiple potential parties. Normalization includes case and company suffix handling.

consignee.certificate_value: SUBSIDIARY ENTERPRISE WITH 100% FOREIGN INVESTMENT ERICSSON
consignee.invoice_value: SUBSIDIARY ENTERPRISE WITH 100% FOREIGN INVESTMENT ERICSSON
consignee.motivation: Consignee name from certificate fully matches invoice's 'Invoice to' and 'Sold to' fields with identical address details and country 'UKRAINE'. Verification based on primary billing field as per 4.2.0.2 priority. Land matches exactly after normalization.

goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple detailed product descriptions matching item numbers listed in certificate (INVOICE numbers 8391985785 and 8391985798).
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses general goods description 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' with explicit invoice references 8391985785 and 8391985798 dated 17/12/2025. Invoice presents detailed item list matching these invoice numbers with corresponding detailed telecom products. Goods description verified according to allowed rule for general description with invoice reference.

quantity.motivation: Quantity stated as '7 PACKAGES' is confirmed by invoice 'Packages 7'. Gross weight G.W 370,890 KG matches 'Total gross weight 370.890 kg' in invoice with exact numeric match after normalization. Weight unit and category are consistent. No mismatches found.

origin.certificate_value: US, MX, AT, CN, TW, MY
origin.invoice_value: Item country of origin codes: US, MX, AT, CN, TW, MY
origin.motivation: Certificate lists multiple origins US, MX, AT, CN, TW, MY with per item origin codes explicitly listed in invoice matching certificate exactly. EU origin normalization rules not applicable here as origin countries are non-EU. All origin countries explicitly identified in invoice's item lines.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter är verifierade och stämmer helt utan tveksamheter eller avvikelser.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet kan verifieras i fakturan. Consignor och consignee är samma, varubeskrivningen är refererad och i linje, kvantiteten och ursprungsländerna överensstämmer. Dokumenten är godkända för automatisk handläggning.
